howItWorks.intro: This nda penalty calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Estimated Damages
rules.formula: Damages = Trade Secret Value × Severity Factor (or Liquidated Amount)
rules.explanation: Fraction of trade secret value based on breach severity.

howItWorks.outro: Laws vary by jurisdiction and change frequently. This is not legal advice — consult a licensed attorney.

faq.question: What are NDA damages?
faq.answer: Can include actual damages, lost profits, unjust enrichment, and sometimes punitive damages.

faq.question: What are liquidated damages?
faq.answer: A pre-agreed damage amount specified in the NDA contract.

faq.question: Is the NDA Penalty Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard legal matters formulas trusted by individuals navigating legal issues. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

faq.question: What trade secret value should I enter?
faq.answer: Enter the most accurate trade secret value value you have available. If you're estimating, use a conservative figure. You can always run the calculator again with different values to see how changes affect the results.

sections.title: What Is the NDA Penalty Calculator?
sections.body: The NDA Penalty Calculator is a free online tool designed for individuals navigating legal issues who need quick, accurate calculations in the legal matters space. By entering your trade secret value, breach severity, liquidated damages in nda, you get instant results including estimated damages, estimated legal costs. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting estimated damages right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In legal matters, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by individuals navigating legal issues worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to understand your legal situation with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your trade secret value and need to find the right estimated damages. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.

howToSteps.description: Type or select your breach severity in the field provided. Use the most accurate value available for best results.

howToSteps.title: Review Your Results

tips: Double-check your trade secret value before calculating — even small input errors can significantly change your results.
